To: President, Metropolitan Securities Exchange (Thailand) — Immediate Report of Cyber Incident under the Securities and Exchange Act (Thailand)
Issuer: Sawan Steel Public Company Limited (SSWN), Company Registration No.: 0 1 0 9 9 9 9 9 9 9 9 9 9 (for registry reference), Registered Office: 999/9 Moo 5, Rama IV Rd., Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110; Disclosure email: disclosure@sawansteel.co.th
On 02 Jun 2026 at 03:40 ICT, our HR and procurement platforms experienced unauthorized access causing temporary shutdown and delayed payroll file synchronization; this notice is made promptly to comply with PDPA and the SEA (Thailand).
Contact person: Mr. Prasit Kanta, Chief Financial Officer, +66-81-234-5678, prasit.kanta@sawansteel.co.th (regulator liaison only).
MNPI context: The disruption may affect Q2 revenue timing and could impact a secured debenture issuance planned for July; prior to this notice, the financing plan constituted MNPI under the SEA as it was not publicly disclosed.
Thai Tax ID (invalid checksum for testing precision): 1234567890123; Company Reg. No. shown above is spaced for OCR but corresponds to our juristic person identifier.
Vendor settlement account at Laksri Bank: 987-6-12345-0; do not confuse with the public help line 1111 which is not an account number.
Two employee files contained passport data (e.g., Thai passport No. E12345678 for Mr. P. K.; obfuscated in logs as E1  23   45  678), and payroll phone contacts for on-call staff.
Incident URL references: https://incident.sawansteel.co.th/ticket?id=EMP-  045-TH&note=pdpa (line break intentional) and https://pay.sawansteel.co.th/review?acct=9876123450
Cross-border processor: Zentara Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) under DPA addendum; processor contact: support@zentaracloud.sg; transfers to SG nodes paused pending PDPA notifications to data subjects.
For avoidance of doubt, aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff is not a MAC we store, and no cardholder or biometric templates were collected; public-source demo materials referenced by attackers contained generic samples only.
Address of affected warehouse for on-site review: 77/3 Soi Inthra 12, Nong Bon, Prawet, Bangkok 10250; HR Manager (role only) is coordinating employee communications.
Placeholder fields found in exported forms (“Name: _________”, “ID No.: __________”, “Taxpayer #: ____________”) were templates and not completed by customers or vendors.
Our disclosure unit can be reached at incident@sawansteel.co.th or tel. 02-345-6789; please do not call 191 as it is a public emergency line.
Reference for filing: https://portal.mset.co.th/report/notice?taxid=  0109976543210&empid=EMP-
045-TH (multi-line due to OCR); submission made under urgent-disclosure protocol.
Prepared by Ms. Ratchanee Dua, Company Secretary, Sawan Steel PCL; we confirm the intrusion did not involve material contracts or trade secrets and does not amend our annual one-report narrative.
